pre_mission.speaker: Vex
pre_mission.line: Because what wakes below this keep will not care who fed it. Only who remains.

pre_mission.speaker: Sera
pre_mission.line: Then for now, our path is shared.

battle_start.speaker: Zephyr
battle_start.line: Some people really do not rehearse small talk.

post_mission.speaker: Draven
post_mission.line: A monster can spare a child and still be a monster.

post_mission.speaker: Aric
post_mission.line: Save the argument. We are not done here.
